question:
A booster pump can be used for filling as well as for emptying a tank. The capacity of
the tank is 1800 m3. The emptying capacity of the tank is 10 m3/min higher than its
filling capacity, and the pump needs 6 minutes lesser to empty the tank than it needs
to fill it. What is the filling capacity of the pump in m3/min?
फूस्टय ऩंऩ का उऩमॉग टैंक कॉ बयने के ऴाथ-ऴाथ खारी कयने के लरए बी ककमा जा ऴकता वै।
टैंक की धारयता 1800 m3 वै। टैंक की खारी कयने की क्षभता, इऴकी बयने की क्षभता ऴ े 10
m3/min अधधक वै, औय ऩंऩ कॉ टैंक कॉ खारी कयने भें लजतना ऴभम रगता वै, उऴ े बयन े भ ें उऴऴे
6 लभनट कभ ऴभम रगता वै। ऩंऩ की बयने की क्षभता m3/min भें ककतनी वै?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A water tank can be filled in 19 minutes by using 39 pipes of the same
capacity. In how many minutes (rounded off to two decimal places) will the
water tank be filled if we use 23 pipes of the same capacity as above?
एक ऩानी की टंकी कॉ ऴभान क्षभता के 39 ऩाइऩों का उऩमॉग कयके 19 लभनट भें बया जा ऴकता
वै। मदद उऩयॉक्त के ऴभान क्षभता के 23 ऩाइऩों का उऩमॉग कयते वैं, तॉ ऩानी की टंकी ककतने लभनट
(दलभरऱ के दॉ स्थानों तक ऩूणाांककत) भें बय जाएगी?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
There are two pipes used to fill a tank and when operated together, they can
fill the tank in 20 minutes. If one pipe can fill the tank two and a half times as
quickly as the other, then the faster pipe alone can fill the tank in:
एक टैंक कॉ बयने के लरए दॉ ऩाइऩों का उऩमॉग ककमा जाता वै औय जफ उन्हें एक ऴाथ चरामा
जाता वै, तॉ ऱे टैंक कॉ 20 लभनट भें बय ऴकते वैं। मदद एक ऩाइऩ दऴू य े की तुरना भें ढाई गुना तेजी
ऴे टैंक बय ऴकता वै, तॉ तेज ऩाइऩ अके रे टैंक कॉ ककतने ऴभम भें बय ऴकता वै:
[RRB Group-D 2025]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe A can fill an empty tank in 18 hours and pipe B can fill the same empty
tank in 24 hours. If both the pipes are opened simultaneously, how much time
(in hours) will they take to fill the empty tank?
ऩाइऩ A एक खारी टैंक कॉ 18 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै औय ऩाइऩ B उऴी खारी टैंक कॉ 24 घंटे भें बय
ऴकता वै। मदद दॉनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉर ददमा जाए, तॉ खारी टैंक कॉ बयने भें उन्हें ककतना
ऴभम (घंटों भें) रगेगा?
[SSC CGL 2023 PRE]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes, A and B, can fill a tank of 7800 litres in 12 hours and 10 hours,
respectively. If they are opened together, how many hours will they take to fill
an empty tank of 8800 litres?
दॉ ऩाइऩ A औय B 7800 रीटय की एक टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 12 घंटे औय 10 घंटे भें बय ऴकत े वैं। मदद
उन्हें एक ऴाथ खॉर ददमा जाए, तॉ 8800 रीटय की एक खारी टंकी कॉ बयने भें उन्हें ककतने घंटे
रगेंग?े (RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
An inlet pipe can fill an empty tank in 3.6 hours, while an outlet pipe can drain
a completely-filled tank in 6.3 hours. If both the pipes are opened
simultaneously when the tank is empty, in how many hours will the tank get
completely filled?
एक इनरेट ऩाइऩ एक खारी टैंक कॉ 3.6 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै, जफकक एक आउटरेट ऩाइऩ ऩयू ी
तयव ऴ े बय े टैंक कॉ 6.3 घंटे भें खारी कय ऴकता वै। मदद टैंक खारी वॉने ऩय दॉनों ऩाइऩ एक ऴाथ
खॉरे जात े वैं, तॉ टैंक ककतने घंटे भें ऩूयी तयव ऴे बय जाएगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three pipes X, Y and Z release three different chemicals A, B and C in a tank. These
pipes can fill the tank in 20, 25 and 40 minutes respectively. If all the pipes are left
open for 10 minutes, what will be the ratio of chemical B in the tank.
तीन ऩाइऩ X, Y औय Z एक टैंक भें तीन लबन्न-लबन्न यऴामन A, B औय C छॉड़ते वैं| मव ऩाइऩ
क्रभलः 20, 25 औय 40 लभनट भें टैंक कॉ बय ऴकत े वैं| मदद ऴबी ऩाइऩों कॉ 10 लभनट के लरए
खुरा छॉड़ ददमा जाता वै तॉ टैंक भें यऴामन B का अनुऩात क्या वॉगा ?
[RRB Group-D 2022]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three pipes A, B and C can fill a cistern in 12, 18 and 24 minutes, respectively. If
all the pipes are opened together for 7 minutes, what will be the volume of the
water that overflows as the percentage of the total volume of the cistern?
तीन ऩाइऩ A, B औय C एक जरालम कॉ क्रभलः 12, 18 औय 24 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वै। मदद ऴबी
ऩाइऩ 7 लभनट के लरए एक ऴाथ खॉर ददमे जाते वै, तॉ जरालम के कु र आमतन का ककतन े
प्रधतलत जर अधतप्रऱाव के रूऩ भें फव जाएगा?
options:
Gagan Pratap Sir 9. Pipe A can fill a tank in 17 hours, pipe B can fill the same tank in 21 hours and
pipe C can fill the same tank in 19 hours. The time taken by them to fill the
same tank if they operate together is.
ऩाइऩ A ककऴी टैंक कॉ 17 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै, ऩाइऩ B उऴी टैंक कॉ 21 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै औय
ऩाइऩ C उऴी टैंक कॉ 19 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। मदद ऱे ऴबी एक-ऴाथ चारू कय ददए जाएं, तॉ उऴी
टैंक कॉ बयने भें ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe A can fill a tank in 18 hours, pipe B can fill the same tank in 28 hours and
pipe C can fill the same tank in 11 hours. The time taken by them to fill the
same tank if they operate together is:
ऩाइऩ A ककऴी टैंक कॉ 18 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै, ऩाइऩ B उऴी टैंक कॉ 28 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै औय
ऩाइऩ C उऴी टैंक कॉ 11 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। मदद ऱ े एक-ऴाथ चारू कय ददए जाएं, तॉ उऴी टैंक कॉ
बयने भ ें उन्हें ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes fill a tank when working individually in 25 and 40 hours,
respectively while a third pipe can drain the filled tank in 16 hours. If all the
three pipes are turned on at the same time when the tank is empty, how long
will it take to fill the tank completely?
दॉ ऩाइऩ ककऴी खारी टैंक कॉ अके रे क्रभलः 25 औय 40 घंटों भें बय देते वैं जफकक एक तीऴया
ऩाइऩ बये रृए टैंक कॉ 16 घंटों भ ें खारी कय देता वै। जफ टैंक ऩूयी तयव ऴे खारी वॉ औय तीनों ऩाइऩों
कॉ एक ऴाथ चरा ददमा जामे तॉ टैंक ककतने ऴभम भें बय जामेगा ?
RRB ALP 17/08/2018 (Afternoon)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If pipe A can fill a cistern in X hours, pipe B can fill the same cistern in Y hours,
and pipe C can empty the full cistern in Z hours, then find the time taken to
completely fill the cistern, if Pipes A, B and C are opened together.
मदद ऩाइऩ A एक टंकी कॉ X घंटे भ ें बय ऴकता वै, ऩाइऩ B उऴी टंकी कॉ Y घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै, औय
ऩाइऩ C ऩूयी बयी टंकी कॉ Z घंटे भ ें खारी कय ऴकता वै, तॉ ऩाइऩ A, B औय C ऴबी कॉ एक ऴाथ
खॉर ददए जान े ऩय, टंकी कॉ ऩूया बयने भें रगने ऱारा ऴभम ज्ञात कीलजए।
[Group D 29/09/2022 Afternoon]
Gagan Pratap Sir
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A pipe can fill a tank in 10 hours. Due to a leak in the bottom, it fills the tank in
22.5 hours. If the tank is full, then how much time will the leak take to empty it?
एक ऩाइऩ एक टैंक कॉ 10 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। तर भें रयऴाऱ के कायण, मव टैंक कॉ 22.5 घंटे भें
बयता वै। मदद टैंक ऩूया बया रृआ वै, तॉ रयऴाऱ टंकी कॉ ककतन े ऴभम भें खारी कय ऴकता वै?
(RPF CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
An electric pump can fill a tank in 8 hours. Due to a leakage in the tank, it takes
hours to fill the tank. How much time will this leak take to empty the full tank if water
does not get in or out of the tank through any other point during this period?
एक इरेक्ट्रिक ऩंऩ एक टैंक कॉ 8 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। टैंक भें रयऴाऱ के कायण, टैंक कॉ बयने
भें घंटे रगत े वैं। मदद इऴ अऱधध के दॊयान ककऴी अन्य कफिंद ु ऴे ऩानी टैंक भें न तॉ आता वै औय न
वी फावय जाता वै, तॉ इऴ रयऴाऱ ऴे ऩूया टैंक ककतन े ऴभम भें खारी वॉ जाएगा?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A tank is normally filled in 20 hours by a pipe, but it takes 8 hours more to fill
the tank due to a leakage at its bottom. The leakage point can empty the tank
when it is 60 % full in ________ hours.
एक टंकी ऴाभान्यतः एक ऩाइऩ द्वाया 20 घंटे भें बय जाती वै, रेककन तरी भें रयऴाऱ के कायण टंकी
कॉ बयने भ ें 8 घंटे अधधक रगते वैं। रयऴाऱ धछद्र टैंक कॉ ________ घंटों भें 60% बया वॉन े ऩय
खारी कय ऴकता वै।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes can fill a cistern, individually, in 99 min and 90 min, respectively.
There is a pipe located at the bottom of the cistern to empty it. If all the three
pipes are opened simultaneously, then the empty cistern gets filled in 50 min.
How long will the pipe at the bottom of the tank take to empty the completely
filled cistern if no other pipe is then open?
दॉ ऩाइऩ एक टंकी कॉ अरग-अरग क्रभलः 99 min औय 90 min भें बय ऴकत े वैं। टंकी कॉ खारी
कयने के लरए उऴके तर भें एक ऩाइऩ रगा वै। मदद तीनों ऩाइऩ एक ऴाथ खॉर ददए जाएं, तॉ खारी
टंकी 50 min भें बय जाएगी। मदद कॉई अन्य ऩाइऩ खुरा नवीं वै, तॉ टंकी के तर ऩय रगा ऩाइऩ,
ऩूयी तयव बयी रृई टंकी कॉ खारी कयने भें ककतना ऴभम रेगा?
(RRB NTPC 12TH LEVEL CBT-2 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes can fill a cistern, individually, in 98 min and 28 min, respectively.
There is a pipe located at the bottom of the cistern to empty it. If all the three
pipes are opened simultaneously, then the empty cistern gets filled in 21 min.
How long will the pipe at the bottom of the cistern take to empty the
completely filled cistern if no other pipe is then open?
दॉ ऩाइऩ एक टंकी कॉ अरग-अरग क्रभलः 98 min औय 28 min भें बय ऴकत े वैं। टंकी कॉ खारी
कयने के लरए टंकी के तर ऩय एक ऩाइऩ रगा वै। मदद तीनों ऩाइऩ एक ऴाथ खॉर ददए जाएँ, तॉ
खारी टंकी 21 min भ ें बय जाती वै। मदद कॉई अन्य ऩाइऩ खुरा न वॉ, तॉ टंकी के तर ऩय रगा
ऩाइऩ ऩूयी तयव ऴे बयी रृई टंकी कॉ खारी कयने भें ककतना ऴभम रेगा?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A and B can fill a tank in 20 hours and 25 hours, respectively. Pipe C is an
emptying pipe. When all the three pipes are opened for 15 hours, then part of
the tank filled. How much time (in hours) will pipe C take to empty one-third
part of the tank?
ऩाइऩ A औय B एक टैंक कॉ क्रभलः 20 घंटे औय 25 घंटे भें बय ऴकते वैं। ऩाइऩ C एक लनकाऴ ऩाइऩ
वै। तीनों ऩाइऩों कॉ 15 घंटे तक एक ऴाथ खॉरने ऩय टंकी का बाग बया जा ऴकता वै। ऩाइऩ C,
टैंक के एक-धतवाई बाग कॉ खारी कयने भें ककतना ऴभम (घंटॉ भें) रेगा?
(ICAR Technician 2023)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe X can fill a tank in 60 hours while pipe Y can fill the tank in 72 hours. Both
pipes are opened together for 20 hours. How much of the tank is left empty ?
ऩाइऩ X एक टैंक कॉ 60 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै जफकक ऩाइऩ Y एक टैंक कॉ 72 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै।
दॉनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक ऴाथ 20 घंटे के लरए खॉरा जाता वै। टंकी का ककतना बाग खारी फचा वै?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
If two pipes A and B are opened simultaneously an empty tank will be filled in
20 hours. Only when pipe A opens, it fills the empty tank 9 hours earlier than
the time it takes for pipe B to fill it alone, so how much time will it take pipe B to
fill this empty tank alone?
मदद दॉ ऩाइऩ A औय B एक ऴाथ खॉरे जात े वैं तॉ एक खारी टंकी 20 घंटे भ ें बय जाएगी। के ऱर ऩाइऩ A
खॉरे जाने ऩय, मव खारी टंकी कॉ ऩाइऩ B द्वाया इऴ े अके रे बयन े भ ें लरए जाने ऱारे ऴभम की तुरना भ ें 9
घंटे ऩवरे बय देता वै, तॉ ऩाइऩ B कॉ अके रे मव खारी टंकी बयने भ ें ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
[RRB Group-D 2022]
Gagan Pratap Sir
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A and B together can fill an empty tank in minutes. If A takes 3
minutes more than B to fill the tank, then the time in which A alone would fill
one third part of the tank is:
ऩाइऩ A औय B लभरकय एक खारी टैंक कॉ लभनट भ ें बय ऴकत े वै। मदद A टैंक कॉ बयने भ ें B ऴ े 3 लभनट
का अधधक ऴभम रेता वै, तॉ A अके रे उऴी टैंक कॉ एक धतवाई बाग ककतन े ऴभम भ ें बय देगा?
[RRB Group-D 2022]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A, B and C together can fill a cistern in 12 hours. All the three pipes are opened
together for 4 hours and then C is closed. A and B together take 10 hours to fill the
remaining part of the cistern. C alone will fill two thirds of the cistern in:
ऩाइऩ A, B औय C टैंक कॉ लभरकय 12 घंटें भें बय ऴकते वै। तीनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक ऴाथ 4 घंटें के लरए
खॉरा जाता वै औय C कॉ फंद कय ददमा जाता वै। A औय B कॉ लभरकय टैंक के लेळ बाग कॉ बयने
भें 10 घंटें रगत े वै। C अके रे टैंक के दॉ धतवाई बाग कॉ ककतन े ऴभम भें बय देगा? टैंक कॉ बयने भें
लरमा गमा ऴभम ज्ञात कीलजए।
(RPF CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes P and Q can fill a tank in 18 and 27 minutes, respectively, whereas pipe R
can empty the full tank in 54 minutes. P and Q were opened together for 6
minutes and then closed and R was opened. The tank was emptied by R alone
in how many minutes:
ऩाइऩ P औय Q एक टैंक कॉ क्रभलः 18 लभनट औय 27 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वै, जफ कक ऩाइऩ ऩूया
टैंक 54 लभनट भें खारी कय ऴकता वै। ऩाइऩ P औय Q कॉ 6 लभनट के लरए एक ऴाथ खॉरा गमा
औय कपय फंद कय ददमा गमा, औय ऩाइऩ R कॉ खॉर ददमा गमा। ऩाइऩ R अके रा उऴ टैंक कॉ ककतने
लभनट भें खारी कय देगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe P can fill part of a tank in 18 hours, and pie Q can fill part of the same
tank in 25 hours. Both P and Q were kept open for 3 hours, then both were
closed. Pipe R alone was then opened and it emptied the water in the tank in 8
hours. Pipes P, Q and R together can fill the empty tank in:
ऩाइऩ P, ककऴी टैंक के बाग कॉ 18 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै, औय ऩाइऩ Q उऴी टैंक के बाग कॉ 25
घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। P औय Q दॉनों कॉ 3 घंटे के लरए चारू यखा जाता वै, औय कपय दॉनों कॉ फंद कय
Gagan Pratap Sir ददमा जाता वै। कपय ऩाइऩ R कॉ अके रे चारू ककमा जाता वै जॉ टैंक के ऩानी कॉ 8 घंटे भें खारी कय
देता वै। ऩाइऩ P, Q औय R लभरकय खारी टैंक कॉ ककतने ऴभम भें बय ऴकते वैं?
(RRB NTPC 12th LEVEL 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe P can fill 3/4 part of a tank in 18 hours and pipe Q can fill 3/5 part of its
tank in 12 hours. Both P and Q were kept open for 4 hours, then both were
closed. Then pipe R alone was opened, and it emptied out the water from the
tank in 5 hour. In how much time can the pipe P, Q and R together fill the
empty tank?
ऩाइऩ P एक टैंक के 3/4 बाग कॉ 18 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै औय ऩाइऩ Q अऩने टैंक के 3/5 बाग कॉ
12 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। P औय Q दॉनों कॉ 4 घंटे के लरए खुरा यखा गमा कपय दॉनों कॉ फंद कय
ददमा गमा। कपय अके रे ऩाइऩ R कॉ खॉरा गमा, औय इऴने 5 घंटे भें टैंक ऴ े ऩानी कॉ खारी कय
ददमा। ऩाइऩ P, Q औय R लभरकय खारी टैंक कॉ ककतने ऴभम भें बय ऴकते वैं?
(RPF CONSTABLE 2024)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe P can fill a tank in 28 minutes and pipe Q can fill the same tank in 35
minutes. If pipes P and Q are opened simultaneously when the tank is empty
and pipe P is closed after 12 minutes, how long will it take pipe Q to fill the rest
of the tank?
ऩाइऩ P एक टंकी कॉ 28 लभनट भ ें बय ऴकता वै औय ऩाइऩ Q इऴी टंकी कॉ 35 लभनट भें बय
ऴकता वै। टंकी खारी वॉने ऩय मदद ऩाइऩ P औय Q कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉरा जाता वै औय 12 लभनट के
फाद ऩाइऩ P कॉ फंद कय ददमा जाता वै, तॉ लेळ टंकी कॉ बयने भें ऩाइऩ Q कॉ ककतने ऴभम रगेगा?
[RRB Group-D 2022]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes A and B can fill a tank in 24 minutes and 32 minutes, respectively.
Both the pipes are opened together, but after 8 minutes pipe A is turned off.
What is the total time required to fill the tank?
दॉ ऩाइऩ A औय B एक टैंक कॉ क्रभलः 24 लभनट औय 32 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं। दॉनों ऩाइऩ एक
ऴाथ खॉरे जाते वैं, रेककन 8 लभनट के फाद ऩाइऩ A कॉ फंद कय ददमा जाता वै। टैंक बयने भ ें कु र
ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
(RPF CONSTABLE 2024)
options:
21 min 20 sec
Gagan Pratap Sir 28. A pipe can fill an empty tank in 12.5 hours. At the bottom of the tank there was
a leakage point which can drain the completely filled tank in 17.5 hours. The
leakage point could be closed after 14 hours of opening the pipe to fill the tank.
What was the total time taken (in hours) to fill the tank ?
एक ऩाइऩ ककऴी खारी टंकी कॉ 12.5 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै। टंकी के तरी भें रयऴाऱ था, लजऴऴे ऩूयी
बयी रृई टंकी 17.5 घंटे भें खारी वॉ ऴकती वै। टंकी कॉ बयने के लरए ऩाइऩ कॉ खॉरने के 14 घंटे
फाद रयऴाऱ कॉ फंद ककमा जा ऴका। टंकी कॉ बयने भें रगने ऱारा कु र ऴभम (घंटे भें) ककतना था ?
[Level 5 (15/06/2022) Shift 2]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A and B can fill a tank in 30 hours and 45 hours, respectively while pipe C
alone can empty the full tank in 20 hours. When the tank is full, C alone is
opened for 8 hours and then closed and pipes A and B are opened together at
the same time. Now, how much time will pipe A and B together take to fill the
tank completely?
ऩाइऩ A औय B एक टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 30 घंटे औय 45 घंटे भें बय ऴकत े वैं, जफकक अके रे ऩाइऩ C
ऩूयी बयी टंकी कॉ 20 घंटे भ ें खारी कय ऴकता वै। जफ टंकी ऩूयी बय जाती वै, तॉ अके रे C कॉ 8 घंटे
के लरए खॉरा जाता वै, औय कपय फंद कय ददमा जाता वै, औय कपय एक वी ऴभम ऩय ऩाइऩ A औय B
कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉरा जाता वै। अफ, ऩाइऩ A औय B कॉ एक ऴाथ टंकी कॉ ऩूयी तयव ऴे बयने भें
ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
[Level 3 (17/06/2022) Shift 2]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A and B can fill an empty cistern in 78 minutes and 24 minutes,
respectively. Both Pipe A and Pipe B are opened together. After how much time
should Pipe A be turned off so that the empty cistern is completely filled in a
total of 20 minutes?
ऩाइऩ A औय B एक खारी टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 78 लभनट औय 24 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं। ऩाइऩ A औय
ऩाइऩ B दॉनों कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉरा जाता वै। ककतन े ऴभम फाद ऩाइऩ A कॉ फंद कय देना चारवए ताकक
खारी टंकी कु र 20 लभनट भें ऩूयी बय जाए?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A and B can fill an empty cistern in 72 minutes and 51 minutes,
respectively. Both Pipe A and Pipe B are opened together. After how much time
should Pipe A be turned off so that the empty cistern is completely filled in a
total of 34 minutes?
Gagan Pratap Sir ऩाइऩ A औय B एक खारी टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 72 लभनट औय 51 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं। ऩाइऩ A औय
ऩाइऩ B दॉनों कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉरा जाता वै। ककतन े ऴभम फाद ऩाइऩ A कॉ फंद कय देना चारवए ताकक
खारी टंकी कु र 34 लभनट भें ऩूयी बय जाए ?
(RPF CONSTABLE 2025)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two valves P and B can fill a sump in 37 minutes and 45 minutes respectively.
Both valves are opened. The sump will be filled in just 30 minutes, if valve B is
turned off after :
दॉ ऩाइऩ P औय B एक टंकी कॉ क्रभल: 37 लभनट औय 45 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं। दॉनों ऩाइऩ खुरे
वैं। टंकी 30 लभनट भें बय जामेगी, मदद ऩाइऩ B कॉ ......फाद फंद कय ददमा जाता वैं।
RRB ALP 13/08/2018 (Afternoon)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe A can fill a tank in 16 minutes and pipe B empties it in 24 minutes. If both
the pipes are opened simultaneously, after how many minutes should B be
closed so that the tank is filled in 30 minutes?
ऩाइऩ A एक टैंक कॉ 16 लभनट भें बय ऴकता वै औय ऩाइऩ B इऴे 24 लभनट भें खारी कयता वै| मदद
दॉनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉर ददमा जाए तॉ ककतने लभनट फाद B कॉ फंद कय ददमा जाना चारवए
लजऴऴे कक टैंक 30 लभनट भें बय जाए?
[SSC CPO 2019]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
An empty cistern has three pipes A, B and C, A and B can fill it in 45hrs and 36
hours respectively and C can empty it in 37 hr. After how much time draining
pipe should be closed so that cistern is filled in 32 hrs.
एक खारी टैंक भें तीन ऩाइऩ A, B औय C रगे रृए वै, A औय B इऴे क्रभलः 45 घंटे औय 36 घंटे भें
बय ऴकत े वैं औय C इऴ े 37 घंटे भें खारी कय ऴकता वैं। ककतन े ऴभम फाद रयऴाऱ ऩाइऩ कॉ फंद
ककमा जाना चारवए ताकक टैंक 32 घंटे भें बय जाए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes A and B can fill a tank in 12 minutes and 24 minutes, respectively,
while a third pipe C can empty the full tank in 32 minutes. All the three pipes
are opened simultaneously. However, pipe C is closed 2 minutes before the
tank is filled. In how much time (in minutes) will the tank be full?
Gagan Pratap Sir दॉ ऩाइऩ A औय B एक टंकी कॉ क्रभल: 12 लभनट औय 24 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं, ऱवीं ऩाइऩ C ऩूयी
बयी रृई टंकी कॉ 32 लभनट भें खारी कय ऴकती वै। तीनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉर ददमा गमा।
वारांकक ऩाइऩ C कॉ टंकी के बयने 2 लभनट ऩवरे फंद कय ददमा गमा। टंकी ककतने ऴभम (लभनट
भें)भें ऩूयी तयव बय जाएगी?
(CGL MAINS 2021)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A leak in the bottom of a tank can empty the full tank in 9 hours. An inlet pipe
fills water at the rate of 5 liters per minute. When the tank is full, the inlet is
opened and due to the leak the tank gets empty in 12 hours. The capacity of
the tank (in liters) is?
एक टैंक के तर भें एक रयऴाऱ 9 घंटे भें ऩूया टैंक खारी कय ऴकता वै। एक इनरेट ऩाइऩ 5 रीटय
प्रधत लभनट की दय ऴे ऩानी बयता वै। जफ टंकी बय जाती वै तॉ इनरेट खॉरा जाता वै औय रयऴाऱ के
कायण टंकी 12 घंटे भ ें खारी वॉ जाती वै। टैंक की क्षभता (रीटय भें) वै?
(ICAR Technician 2022)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes can fill a cistern separately in 36 minutes and 45 minutes,
respectively. A waste pipe can drain off 40 litres per minute. If all the three
pipes are opened, the cistern fills in one hour. The capacity (in litres of the
cistern) is
दॉ ऩाइऩ एक टंकी कॉ अरग-अरग तॊय ऩय क्रभलः 36 लभनट औय 45 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं।
टंकी भ ें रगा एक लनकाऴ ऩाइऩ प्रधत लभनट 40 रीटय ऩानी लनकार ऴकता वै। मदद तीनों ऩाइऩ
एक ऴाथ खॉर ददए जाएं तॉ टंकी एक घंटे भें बय जाती वै। टंकी की क्षभता/धारयता (रीटय भें) ज्ञात
कीलजए।
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A, B and C can fill a tank in 30 h, 40 h and 60 h respectively. Pipes A, B
and C are opened at 7 a.m., 8 a.m., and 10 a.m., respectively on the same day.
When will the tank be full?
ऩाइऩ A, B औय C क्रभलः 30 h, 40 h औय 60 h भें एक टैंक बय ऴकत े वैं। ऩाइऩ A, B औय C उऴी
ददन क्रभलः 7 फजे, 8 फजे औय 10 फजे खॉरे जाते वैं। टंकी कफ बयी जाएगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipes A and B can fill a tank in 16 hours and 24 hours, respectively, and pipe C
alone can empty the full tank in x hours. All the pipes were opened together at
Gagan Pratap Sir 10:30 a.m., but C was closed at 2:30 p.m. If the tank was full at 8:30 p.m. on the
same day, then what is the value of x?
ऩाइऩ A औय B क्रभलः 16 घंटे औय 24 घंटे भें एक टैंक बय ऴकत े वैं, औय अके रे ऩाइऩ C, x घंटे भें
ऩूया टैंक खारी कय ऴकता वैं। ऴबी ऩाइऩ एक ऴाथ ऴुफव 10:30 फजे खॉरे गए, रेककन C कॉ 2:30
फजे फंद कय ददमा गमा। अगय उऴी ददन ऴाढे आठ फजे टंकी बय जाती वै, तॉ x का भान क्या वै?
[SSC CGL MAINS 2021]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
An empty cistern has three pipes A, B and C. A and B can fill it in 24hrs and 30
hours respectively and C can empty it in 8hr 20 minutes. If these pipes are
opened in order at 1PM, 4PM and 6 PM, when will the cistern be empty again?
दॉ ऩाइऩ ककऴी खारी टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 24 घंटे औय 30 घंटे भें ऩानी ऴे बय ऴकत े वै औय एक तीऴया
ऩाइऩ इऴ टंकी कॉ 8 घंटे 20 लभनट भें खारी कय ऴकता वै मदद इन ऩाइऩों कॉ क्रभलः दॉऩवय 1PM,
4 PM औय 6 PM फजे खॉरा जाए, तॉ टंकी ऩुनः ककतने फजे खारी वॉगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
One fill pipe A takes 21 minutes more to fill the cistern than two fill pipes A and
B opened together to fill it. Second fill pipe B takes 27 minutes more to fill the
cistern than two fill pipes A and B opened together to fill it. When will the
cistern be full if both the pipes are opened simultaneously?
ऩाइऩ A द्वाया टैंक बयने भें ऩाइऩ A औय B द्वाया एक ऴाथ बयने की तुरना भें 21 लभनट अधधक
रगते वैं दऴु य े ऩाइऩ B कॉ टैंक बयने भें ऩाइऩ A औय B द्वाया एक ऴाथ बयने की तुरना भ ें 27
लभनट अधधक रगते वैं वैं। मदद दॉनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक ऴाथ खॉरा जाता वै तॉ कफ बयी जाएगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A tank is filled by three tankers with uniform flow. The first two tankers
operating simultaneously fill the sump in the same time during which the
sump is filled by the third tanker alone. The second tanker fills the sump 7
hours faster than the first tanker and 9 hours slower than the third tanker. The
time required by the first tanker is :
एक टैंक कॉ तीन टैंकयों के भाध्यभ ऴे एक ऴभान प्रऱाव ऴे बया जाता वै। मदद ऩवरे दॉ टैंकय एक
ऴाथ चरामे जाते वैं तॉ टैंक कॉ बयने भें उतना वी ऴभम रगता वै, लजतना अके रे तीऴय े टैंकय कॉ
चराकय टैंक बयने भें रगता वै। दऴू या टैंकय ऩवरे टैंकय की अऩेक्षा 7 घंटे तेजी ऴ े औय तीऴय े टैंकय
की अऩेक्षा 9 घंटे धीभी गधत ऴ े टैंक कॉ बयता वै। ऩवरी टैंकय के लरए आऱश्यक ऴभम वै:
RRB ALP 21/08/2018 (Evening)
options:
30 hours
Gagan Pratap Sir 43. Two pipes A and B can fill an empty cistern in 18 and 27 hours, respectively. Pipe C can
drain the entire cistern in 45 hours when no other pipe is in operation. Initially, when
the cistern was empty Pipe A and Pipe C were turned on. After a few hours Pipe A was
turned off and Pipe B was turned on instantly. In all, it took 55 hours to fill the cistern.
For how many hours was pipe B turned on ?
दॉ ऩाइऩ A औय B ककऴी खारी टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 18 औय 27 घंटे भ ें बय देत े वैं। ऩाइऩ C ऩूय े बयी टंकी कॉ 45
घंटे भ ें खारी कय देता वै जफ कॉई अन्य ऩाइऩ नवीं चर यवा वॉ। लुरुआत भ ें जफ टंकी खारी थी, ऩाइऩ A औय
C कॉ चारू ककमा गमा। कु छ घंटों के फाद ऩाइऩ A कॉ फंद कय ददमा गमा औय ऩाइऩ B कॉ चारू ककमा गमा।
इऴ प्रकाय टंकी बयन े भ ें कु र 55 घंटे रगे। ऩाइऩ B कॉ ककतन े घंटे चरामा गमा ?
RRB ALP 17/08/2018 (Morning)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes X and Y can fill a tank in 21 hours and 24 hours respectively. Both
pipes are opened simultaneously and it is found that due to a leakage in the
tank it takes 48 min more to fill the tank. When the tank is completely full, in
how much time will the tank be completely emptied by leakage alone, if all
pipes are closed?
दॉ ऩाइऩ X औय Y एक टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 21 घंटे औय 24 घंटे भें बय ऴकते वैं। दॉनों ऩाइऩों कॉ एक
ऴाथ खॉर ददमा जाता वै औय मव ऩामा गमा कक टंकी भें एक रयऴाऱ के कायण टंकी कॉ बयने भें 48
लभनट अधधक ऴभम रगता वै। टंकी के ऩूयी तयव ऴे बयी वॉने ऩय, मदद ऴबी ऩाइऩों कॉ फंद कय ददमा
जाए, तॉ के ऱर रयऴाऱ के द्वाया टंकी ककतन े ऴभम भें ऩूयी तयव ऴे खारी वॉ जाएगी?
(RRB NTPC GRADUATE LEVEL 2025 CBT-1)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two pipes A and B can fill a cistern in 24hr and 27hr respectively. Both taps are
opened and after 2 hrs16minutes, it is noticed that there was a leakage. leakage is
repaired immediately. it takes 96 min extra for cistern to fill than normal. if cistern is
full how much time leakage would take to empty the cistern?
दॉ ऩाइऩ A औय B क्रभलः 24 घंटे औय 27 घंटे भें एक टैंक बय ऴकत े वैं। दॉनों नर खॉरे जाते वैं औय
2 घंटे 16 लभनट के फाद, मव देखा जाता वै कक टैंक भें एक रयऴाऱ वै। रयऴाऱ की तुयतं भयम्मत की
जाती वै लजऴ कायण टैंक कॉ बयने भ ें ऴाभान्य ऴे 96 लभनट अधधक रगता वै। मदद टैंक बया वै तॉ
अके रे रयऴाऱ कॉ टैंक खारी कयने भ ें ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Three taps A, B and C can fill a tank in 24, 30 and 40 hours respectively. If A is
open all the time and B and C are open for one hour each alternately, then the
tank will be full in:
Gagan Pratap Sir तीन नर A, B औय C एक टंकी कॉ क्रभलः 24, 30 औय 40 घंटे भें बय ऴकत े वैं। मदद A वय ऴभम
खुरा यवता वै औय B औय C फायी-फायी ऴे एक-एक घंटे के लरए खुरे यवत े वैं, तॉ टंकी ककतन े ऴभम
भें बय जाएगी?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe A could fill an empty cistern in 18 hours while Pipe B can drain a filled
cistern in 30 hours. When the cistern is empty, Pipe A is turned on for an hour
and then turned off. Now Pipe B is allowed to drain out water from the cistern
for an hour and then turned off. The pipes were alternatively left open for an
hour each time till the cistern was full. How much time did it take for the
cistern to be full?
ऩाइऩ A 18 घंटे भें एक खारी टंकी बय ऴकता वै जफकक ऩाइऩ B 30 घंटे भें एक बया रृआ टंकी
खारी कयता वै। जफ टंकी खारी वॉता वै, तॉ ऩाइऩ A कॉ एक घंटे के लरए चारू ककमा जाता वै औय
कपय फंद कय ददमा जाता वै। अफ ऩाइऩ B कॉ एक घंटे के लरए खॉर ददमा गमा औय कपय फंद कय
ददमा गमा। प्रत्येक ऩाइऩ कॉ फायी फायी ऴ े एक घंटे के लरए तफ तक खॉरा गमा जफ तक कक टंकी
ऩूया न बय जाए। टंकी के ऩूयी तयव ऴ े बयने भें ककतना ऴभम रगा?
(RRB NTPC 2021)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
An inlet pipe can fill an empty tank in hours while an outlet pipe drains a
completely filled tank in hours. The tank is initially empty, and the two
pipes are alternately opened for an hour each, till the tank is completely filled,
starting with the inlet pipe. In how many hours will the tank be completely
filled?
एक इनरेट ऩाइऩ एक खारी टैंक कॉ 4 घंटे भें बय ऴकता वै, जफकक एक आउटरेट ऩाइऩ ऩूयी तयव
ऴे बय े टैंक कॉ 7 घंटे भें खारी कय देता वै। टैंक लुरू भैं खारी वै औय इनरेट ऩाइऩ ऴे लुरू वॉत े रृए
दॉनों ऩाइऩ फायी-फायी ऴे एक एक घंटे के लरए खॉरे जात े वैं, जफ तक कक टैंक ऩूयी तयव ऴे बय न
जाए। टैंक ककतने घंटे भें ऩूयी बय जाएगी?
[SSC CGL 2023 PRE]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A, B and C are pipes attached into a cistern. A and B can fill it in 20 and 30
minutes respectively, while C can empty it in 15 minutes. If A, B and C be kept
open successively for 1 minute each, how soon will the cistern be filled?
Gagan Pratap Sir ऩाइऩ A, B औय C एक टैंक भें रगे वैं। A औय B इऴ े क्रभलः 20 औय 30 लभनट भें बय ऴकत े वैं,
जफकक C इऴे 15 लभनट भें खारी कय ऴकता वैं। मदद A, B औय C कॉ फायी फायी ऴे एक लभनट के
लरए खुरा यखा जाए, तॉ ककतने ऴभम भें टैंक बया जाएगा?
(RRB NTPC 2021)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Pipe A can empty a filled tank in 28 hours while B can fill the same tank when
empty in 35 hours. If alternatively, pipe A and B are turned on for an hour each
time, starting when the tank is full, how long will it take to empty the tank?
ऩाइऩ A बय े रृए टैंक कॉ 28 घंटे भें खारी कय ऴकता वै जफकक B, 35 घंटे भें खारी वॉन े ऩय उऴी टैंक
कॉ बय ऴकता वै। मदद ऱैकल्पिक रूऩ ऴे ऩाइऩ A औय B कॉ वय फाय एक घंटे के लरए चारू ककमा
जाता वै, जफ टैंक बया रृआ वॉता वै, तॉ टैंक कॉ खारी कयने भें ककतना ऴभम रगेगा?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
A cistern can be filled by two pipes in 8 minutes and 10 minutes, separately.
Both the pipes are opened together for a certain time, but due to an
obstruction, only 5/8 of the full quantity of water flowed through the former
pipe and 3/5 through the latter pipe. However, the obstruction was suddenly
removed, and the cistern was filled in 3 minutes from that moment. How long
did it take before the full flow began?
एक टंकी कॉ दॉ ऩाइऩों द्वाया अरग-अरग 8 लभनट औय 10 लभनट भें बया जा ऴकता वै। दॉनों
ऩाइऩों कॉ एक लनलित ऴभम के लरए एक ऴाथ खॉरा जाता वै, रेककन एक रुकाऱट के कायण,
ऩानी की ऩूयी भात्रा का के ऱर 5/8 ऩवरे ऱारे ऩाइऩ ऴे औय 3/5 दऴू ये ऩाइऩ ऴे प्रऱारवत वॉता वै।
वाराँकक, रुकाऱट अचानक वटा दी गई, औय उऴ क्षण ऴे 3 लभनट भें टंकी बय गई। ऩूण ण प्रऱाव लुरू
वॉने भ ें ककतना ऴभम रगा?
(SSC CGL 2024 Pre)
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
Two taps A and B can fill a tank in 30 min and 36 min respectively. Both taps
are opened together but due to some problem they work 5/6 and 9/10 of their
efficiency, after some time the problem was removed and the whole tank will
fill in 16 minutes. then after how much time the problem is removed?
दॉ नर A औय B क्रभलः 30 लभनट औय 36 लभनट भें एक टैंक बय ऴकते वैं। दॉनों नर एक ऴाथ
खॉरे जात े वैं रेककन कु छ ऴभस्या के कायण ऱ े अऩनी दक्षता के 5/6 औय 9/10 काम ण कयते वैं, कु छ
ऴभम फाद ऴभस्या कॉ वटा ददमा गमा औय ऩूया टैंक 16 लभनट भें बय जाएगा। कपय ककतन े ऴभम
के फाद ऴभस्या कॉ दयू ककमा जाता वै?
Gagan Pratap Sir
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
1cm,1 cm, 2cm, running together, when the largest alone fill it in 122 minutes,
the amount of water flowing in by each pipe being proportional to the square
of its diameter?
ज्ञात कीलजम े ककतने ऴभम भ ें एक टैंक कॉ एक ऴाथ तीन ऩाइऩों ऴे बया जाएगा लजऴका व्याऴ 1
ऴेभी, 1 ऴेभी, 2 ऴेभी वै, जवा ऴफऴ े फड़ा ऩाइऩ अके रे टैंक कॉ 122 लभनट भें बयता वै, प्रत्येक ऩाइऩ
द्वाया फवने ऱारे ऩानी की भात्रा इऴके व्याऴ के ऱगण के ऴभानुऩाती वै ?
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].

question:
28 pipes are connected to a tank. Some of them pour water into the tank,
whereas the rest drain water out of it. Each of the pipes that fill water can fill
the empty tank in 14 hours, whereas any of the drainpipes can empty the filled
tank in 35 hours, If all the pipes are opened simultaneously when the tank is
empty and the tank is filled in 2.5 hours, how many of pipes were drain pipes ?
28 ऩाइऩ एक टैंक ऴे जुड़े वैं। उनभें ऴे कु छ टैंक भें ऩानी डारते वैं, जफकक फाकी उऴभें ऴ े ऩानी
लनकार देते वैं। ऩानी बयने ऱारा प्रत्येक ऩाइऩ 14 घंटे भें खारी टैंक कॉ बय ऴकता वै, जफकक कॉई
बी लनकाऴी 35 घंटे भें बय े रृए टैंक कॉ खारी कय ऴकता वै, मदद टैंक खारी वॉन े ऩय ऴबी ऩाइऩ
एक ऴाथ खॉरे जाते वैं औय टैंक 2.5 घंटे भें बय जाता वै , ककतने ऩाइऩ लनकाऴी के ऩाइऩ थ े ?
[NTPC CBT - I 19/03/2021 (Morning)]
explanation: Based on the Answer Key, the correct option is [A].
